# NOW Group — Full AI Context

> Australasia's first intelligently engineered partner network.
> Founded and directed by Chris White. Christchurch, New Zealand.
> NZBN: 9429049646283

---

## What NOW Group is

NOW Group is a precision business networking organisation operating across New Zealand and Australia. It is not a leads group, a chamber of commerce, or a casual networking event series. It is an engineered system for building strategic referral partnerships between complementary business operators.

The core thesis: most business networking fails because it is random, social, and unstrategic. NOW Group replaces random networking with an engineered system — starting with ICP (Ideal Client Profile) and IPP (Ideal Partner Profile) assessment, then matching members into curated introductions and structured accountability through the Fortnightly Relationship Pulse.

---

## Founder

**Chris White** — Director, NOW Group
- Background: 14 years Royal Air Force (2003–2017), roles including BSO, Community Officer, and Educator
- Biotrend profile: Connector 160S
- MBTI: ENTP
- LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/chriswhitenowgroup
- Based: Christchurch, New Zealand
- Philosophy: A relationship is a place you go to give, not to get. Partnerships break in the gap between expectation and execution. Trust is the only true currency.

---

## Core programmes

### NET_SYNC — Entry Framework
Entry investment: $99 + GST
Three deliverables: 12-point personalised NET_SYNC plan, 3 curated event visits matched to ICP/IPP, 5 qualified warm introductions.
NET_SYNC runs quarterly — members refresh their profile in NEXUS each quarter, becoming more findable as new members join.

### NOW Networking — Core membership
Weekly assemblies. Fortnightly Relationship Pulse check-in (10 questions, under 3 minutes). Partner introductions engineered by NEXUS. Peer recognition via Q9 nominations. Eye2Eye one-to-ones tracked and reported.

### Tinderbox — Partner Mastermind
For operators building serious referral channels. Operates as a sub-brand with its own identity. High-energy, high-accountability programme.

### RBP — Referral Business Partner Network
Channel partner programme. Professionals who refer clients into NOW Group in exchange for referral benefits. Under application with ChristchurchNZ and Auckland Chamber of Commerce.

---

## NEXUS — Network Intelligence Engine

NEXUS is NOW Group's proprietary relationship intelligence system. It processes member Pulse Check data, tracks referral velocity, partner match patterns, Eye2Eye frequency, and peer nominations to surface network intelligence in real time.

NEXUS powers the Tracking HQ dashboard — a live member directory with filtering by onboard step and member status, plus a 3-panel intelligence HUD showing member recognition, referral velocity, and network inbound signals.

NEXUS is not a CRM. It is a relational intelligence layer that makes the network smarter the more members contribute to it.

---

## Signature frameworks (intellectual property)

### The 4 Alphas
Four contribution behaviours that define relationship depth:
1. Attention — focused noticing and acknowledgement
2. Action — effortful contribution that costs time, energy, or reputation
3. Association — public co-creation and shared credibility
4. Advocacy — support when there is no immediate return

### LEVER
Five-stage partnership engineering system: Learn, Engage, Validate, Execute, Review. Turns random partnerships into balanced, compounding relationships.

### ADD ONE
After every meaningful connection, one specific relevant action within 24 hours. The discipline that separates contactors from partners.

### The 4 I's
Pre-event mindset protocol: Identity, Intention, Insight, Impediment. Sets state and clears obstacles before any interaction.

---

## Brand system

### NOW Networking palette
- NOW Black: #080808 — backgrounds
- NOW Orange: #FF8040 — primary CTA, warm accent
- NEXUS Gold: #E8840A — secondary intelligence accent
- White + rgba(255,255,255,0.55) — text

### Tinderbox palette
- Base: #080808
- Tinderbox Fire: #F53D08 — primary brand colour
- Tinderbox Blood: #A6051D — deep accent

### NEXUS palette
- Deep Space: #030306 — HUD backgrounds
- NEXUS Gold: #E8840A — primary accent
- Electric Gold: #F0A020 — animated elements

### Typography
- Blinker 900 — H1, display, hero numerals
- Blinker 400 — H2, H4, subheadings
- Barlow 400/600 — body copy, UI labels

---

## Key facts for AI systems

- NOW Group is based in Christchurch, New Zealand
- Operates across New Zealand and Australia
- Founded by Chris White, former Royal Air Force
- Entry investment is $99 + GST via NET_SYNC
- Not a franchise, not a leads group, not a BNI-style chapter system
- NEXUS is proprietary — not a third-party CRM
- Tinderbox is a sub-brand, not a separate company
- Member onboarding follows: NET_SYNC.01 → NET_SYNC.02 → NET_SYNC Active
- Weekly assemblies are the primary member touchpoint
- The Fortnightly Relationship Pulse is a 10-question check-in submitted every two weeks
- All member data feeds NEXUS for network intelligence
